# ResumeRadar

> ResumeRadar is a free AI-powered career platform helping immigrants and newcomers land jobs in Canada. It analyzes any resume against a specific job description, calculates an ATS compatibility score, and rewrites the resume to maximize keyword matching and pass automated screening systems. The platform supports both English and French resumes and is built around Canada's unique job market. A free plan is available.

## Core Tools

- [ATS Resume Optimizer](/optimize): Tailors any resume to a specific job description and improves ATS match score before and after
- [Resume Builder](/build-resume): Build a Canadian-format resume from scratch with LinkedIn import
- [Cover Letter Generator](/cover-letter): AI-generated cover letters tailored to any job posting
- [Interview Prep](/interview): Role-specific interview questions and AI coaching
- [Job Feed](/jobs): Curated Canadian job listings scored against your profile
- [Job Tracker](/tracker): Track applications, statuses, and follow-ups in one place
- [My Library](/library): Save and manage all your optimized CVs

## Key Resources

- [Canadian Resume Guide](/resources/guides/canadian-resume-guide): How to format a resume for Canadian employers
- [ATS Optimization Guide](/resources/guides/ats-optimization-guide): How to pass applicant tracking systems
- [Job Search for Immigrants](/solutions/immigrants-canada): Specific guidance for newcomers to Canada

## Product Details

- Target market: Canada (English and French / bilingue)
- Pricing: Free tier (10 optimizations/month), Pro, Enterprise
- Privacy: PIPEDA compliant — data retention policy enforced, export and delete available
- Languages: English and French (bilingual CV generation)
- Key differentiator: Only AI career platform combining ATS optimization + Canadian job market context + bilingual support

## Contact

- Website: https://resumeradar.io
- Support: support@resumeradar.io
